action.query: "PRP" OR "platelet rich plasma" facial Katy Texas

content.text:
**PRP (Platelet-Rich Plasma) facial treatments**, also known as "vampire facials," use your own blood's growth factors to stimulate collagen, improve skin texture, reduce fine lines, brighten tone, and address issues like acne scars or dullness. They are often combined with microneedling and are popular for natural rejuvenation with minimal downtime.[[1]](https://htownaesthetics.com/prp-and-prf-treatments-in-texas/)[[2]](https://cleardermatology.com/our-services/skincare-treatments-and-aesthetic/microneedling-with-platelet-rich-plasma-prp/)

Several medspas and clinics in Katy, Texas (and the greater Houston area) offer PRP facials or related PRP/PRF (platelet-rich fibrin) treatments. Here are some prominent options based on current web results:

- **H-Town Aesthetics** (Katy location): Specializes in PRP facials and PRF treatments for skin rejuvenation, reducing dark circles, dullness, and signs of aging. Address: 21003 Highland Knolls Dr, Suite 103, Katy, TX 77450. Website: htowanaesthetics.com.[[1]](https://htownaesthetics.com/prp-and-prf-treatments-in-texas/)

- **4Ever Young Anti-Aging** (Katy): Offers PRP facials using your own plasma to stimulate healing and refresh the complexion, often with microneedling options. Phone: (346) 988-2190. Website: 4everyoungantiaging.com.[[3]](https://4everyoungantiaging.com/katy/injectables-facial-care/prp-facial/)

- **Clear Dermatology**: Provides microneedling with PRP for smoother, firmer skin and improved acne scars. Website: cleardermatology.com.[[2]](https://cleardermatology.com/our-services/skincare-treatments-and-aesthetic/microneedling-with-platelet-rich-plasma-prp/)

- **Luxe Medical Aesthetics** (The Luxe Effect): Delivers PRP for wrinkles, skin brightening, and hair restoration. Website: theluxeeffect.com.[[4]](https://theluxeeffect.com/our-services/prp/)

- **Integrative Primary Care**: PRP specialist (Dr. Syed Farhat Zaidi) for cosmetic skin rejuvenation and hair loss. Address: 225 Bella Katy Dr, Katy, TX 77494. Phone: 832-500-7585. Website: integrativeprimarycare.net.[[5]](https://www.integrativeprimarycare.net/services/prp)

- **Aesthetic Master Infusions**: PRP therapy for facial rejuvenation, skin texture, and more. Website: aestheticmasterinfusions.com.[[6]](https://www.aestheticmasterinfusions.com/prp)

- **Other mentions**: Rich and Rooted MedSpa, Oasis Laser MedSpa, Blades Wellness (PRF focus), and Sapphira Prive MedSpa also appear to offer PRP or similar services in Katy.[[7]](https://www.richandrootedmedspa.com/prp)[[8]](https://oasislasermedspa.com/)

Yelp and similar sites list additional providers for "vampire facial" or PRP therapy in the area—check recent reviews for patient experiences.[[9]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Vampire+Facial&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX)

**Recommendations**: Contact clinics directly for consultations, pricing (which varies), suitability for your skin type, and current availability. Verify credentials, ask about the process (blood draw, processing, application), expected results, and aftercare. Results typically build over weeks with possible multiple sessions. Always consult a qualified provider to discuss risks and benefits. For the latest details, visit the clinic websites or search local directories.
